subcodes.first_line: O star shining in the horizon of the love of God! The soul-uplifting melody of the All-Merciful, which from the spiritual throat of that nightingale [3.5s]... ...O Lord! What an outpouring of bounty Thou hast vouchsafed, and what a flood of abounding grace Thou hast granted
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نجم لائح در افق محبت الله نغمه جانفزای رحمانی که از حنجر روحانی آن بلبل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
